description: PrometheusWebSpec defines the configuration of the Prometheus web server.

httpConfig.description: httpConfig defines HTTP parameters for web server.

maxConnections.description: maxConnections defines the maximum number of simultaneous connections A zero value means that Prometheus doesn't accept any incoming connection.

pageTitle.description: pageTitle defines the prometheus web page title.

tlsConfig.description: tlsConfig defines the TLS parameters for HTTPS.
